programme.title: Carnival Eats
programme.desc: Noah Cappe heads to the Greater Baton Rouge State Fair for a helping of Cajun treats, like Cajun boudin tacos and pecan pie pops; basking in the lights of the Aurora Winter Festival in Toronto.

programme.title: Carnival Eats
programme.desc: Greater Gulf State Fair in Mobile; Dirty Bird turkey leg and a ride on a crazy midway mash-up, the Mothership; Firefighters' Indian River County Fair in Vero Beach, Fla; the Breakfast Buzz Burger; the Strawberry Lemonade Stick.

programme.title: Carnival Eats
programme.desc: South Florida Garlic Festival in Lake Worth, Florida; claw cake burger and mojo pork pockets; toasted garlic donuts; America's favorite ballpark snack at the National Peanut Festival in Dothan, Alabama; fair food classics with a peanutty twist.

programme.title: Carnival Eats
programme.desc: Noah Cappe visits the Washington County Fair in Utah for the Twisted Pickle Roll -- a deep-fried pickle sushi dream come true -- and has a little dessert in the desert with the Cookie Dough Dog. Then, he's off to the Clark County Fair in Nevada for Pretzel French Toast and the spicy Cheesy Carne Brick. Finally, Noah heads to the North Florida Fair in Tallahassee for their Southern Fried Softshell Sandwich, the Fiery Fiesta Funnel Cake and Grape Gems, a candy-coated fruity treat!

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations
programme.desc: Hearty potato soup, whole-roasted stuffed pork, egg filled arepas and cheesy hot chocolate.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations
programme.desc: Unveiling the favorite flavors of Louisville; this historic town balances country classics like the Hot Brown and burgoo stew with ingenious icons like derby pie and mutton barbecue for a true taste of Americana.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations
programme.desc: Andrew Zimmern visits Prague, a pilsner-lover's paradise in the Czech Republic; the city's cuisine is full of hearty comfort classics like pork knuckle marinated in lager, mushroom soup, sweet plum pastries, and a lot of dumplings.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations
programme.desc: Andrew Zimmern reveals unique cooking methods and ancient recipes in Marrakesh, Morocco, including pigeon-meat pies, beef and lentil dishes cooked in bathhouses and whole lamb slow roasted in underground ovens.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations
programme.desc: From the blistering hot pot and fiery Mapo tofu to spicy Kung Pao Chicken, Andrew Zimmern explores the famous scorching dishes that make Chengdu, China, a delicious destination.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations
programme.desc: Puffy tacos and a giant chalupa burger; slow-cooked brisket, melt-in-your-mouth barbacoa and marinated stuffed quail cooked over mesquite.

programme.title: Man v. Food
programme.desc: Casey travels the country and gets some of the best eats America has to offer, and now it's time to honor the best of the best by inducting the top five absolute cheesiest dishes into the "Man v. Food" Hall of Fame.

programme.desc: Sugar Mama's Bakeshop serves up sweet surprises, like chocolate malted milkshake cupcakes and shortbread unicorns with edible glitter; Churro Co. is giving churros decadent toppings like buttery popcorn sugar and vanilla ice cream.

programme.title: Cake Hunters
programme.sub-title: A Tale of Two Cities Wedding Cake
programme.desc: Ryan and Noble are searching for a cake for their second wedding celebration that perfectly combines salty and sweet, along with their Chicago lives and a reflection of their original intimate Charleston wedding ceremony.

programme.title: Cake Hunters
programme.desc: Oliver, the mayor of Miami Gardens, Fla., envisions a wedding cake featuring local landmarks and his university colors, while his fiancee, tech entrepreneur Pandwe, insists on a cake with natural beauty and vintage, 1920s-era glamour.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Cake Hunters
programme.desc: The theme of Dan and Brittany's wedding is rustic meets glam, and even though their wedding is in a rustic barn, finding a cake with enough glamorous details to make Brittany happy is taking these two on a delicious journey to find the perfect cake.

programme.title: Cake Hunters
programme.desc: High-fashioned southern belle Grace is looking for an over-the-top cake, but her husband-to-be, Jeremy, wants to pay tribute to his late father by keeping it close to his country roots.

programme.title: Food Paradise
programme.desc: Some of America's tastiest twists on the beloved mealtime mashup include breakfast spaghetti, fried chicken and churros, boozy pancakes drunk with flaming Cherries Jubilee and a BBQ beef breakfast bun named The Beast.

programme.desc: Craft beers, hurricanes and liquid nitrogen margaritas poured alongside deep-fried lobster mac and cheese; a soaring corned beef sandwich; a surf-and-turf po' boy.

programme.desc: Eddie Jackson goes hog-wild all day with dishes that use every single part of the pig; these are the perfect porky portions for an entire day of pigging out.

programme.desc: We all have those days where all we crave are the most over-the-top dishes; the kind of dish you only get when treating yourself because they are so big and rich you can barely finish them off.

programme.title: Unique Eats
programme.desc: Dungeness crab from a coal stoked grill; skewers licked by flames; delights from a wood burning oven.

programme.title: Unique Eats
programme.desc: An authentic ramen house in Austin, Texas; a gastropub in Miami serves Asian-inspired pork; traditional Thai food; brunch favorites are transformed into an Asian noodle dishes in Brooklyn.

programme.title: Unique Eats
programme.desc: The most unique eats between a bun.

programme.title: Unique Eats
programme.desc: Twenty-five different topping to go with poutine; a fish and chips shop that offers different fish and batters; fried risotto balls go gourmet with unique sweet and savory fillings; big fat doughnuts are piled high.

programme.title: Unique Eats
programme.desc: Why Minetta Tavern has the most talked about burger in town and what makes it top everyone's reservation hot list.

programme.title: Unique Eats
programme.desc: A Jewish deli serves up their signature smoked meat; French chefs in San Francisco upgrade some Asian classics; a hands-on chef from Massachusetts makes everything from scratch; biscuit sandwiches in Portland.

programme.title: Carnival Eats
programme.sub-title: Stanislaus County Fair; Texas Crab Fest
programme.desc: Noah takes on Lobster Fries and jumps for Grasshopper Fried Pie in Texas.

programme.title: Carnival Eats
programme.desc: Texas-sized treats at Rodeo Austin; Kobe beef Rodeo Austin burger and the massive Stuffed Chop; Pima County Fair in Tucson, Ariz., for a shrimp stick featuring sweet Gulf shrimp and fruity cereal; The Big Rib; brain-numbing Nitro Whip.

programme.title: Carnival Eats
programme.desc: Breakfast on a stick at the Sonoma Marin Fair; the Green Goddess; classic cheese curds and the pink taco.

programme.title: Carnival Eats
programme.desc: Noah Cappe is following the smoke signals to the fairground; he's chowing down on midway food inspired by cooking over an open campfire.

programme.title: Carnival Eats
programme.desc: Noah travels to Edmonton for s'mores mini donuts at K-Days; drops by the North Dakota State Fair and samples wild rice burgers.

programme.title: Carnival Eats
programme.desc: Arabian Nights-themed Riverside County Fair and National Date Festival in Indio, Calif.; Churro Dog; Clay County Agricultural Fair; Cubano Dog; Hawaiian Typhoon.

programme.title: Man's Greatest Food
programme.desc: Roger Mooking goes on a pub crawl to find 15 of the best dishes to go with any drink; chicken wings, nachos, sliders, apps and mains -- they're all here; chefs share insider tips and tricks for making the very best, tastiest bar fare.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Man's Greatest Food
programme.desc: Roger cannot resist the sweet, succulent smoky goodness of barbecue as he canvases the country on the lookout for the fifteen best barbecue dishes wherever he can find them.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Man's Greatest Food
programme.desc: Roger serves up the top 15 masterpieces of the handheld deliciousness that is the hamburger, highlighting an all-points survey of the amazing variety to which the hamburger has evolved.
